title: Tracking Event Codes
description: Standard tracking event code definitions. Harmonized types for display; definition types for semantic category; codified meanings align with openPEPPOL TransportationStatusCode (PEPPOL-INCUBATION-LOGISTICS), X12 EDI 157, and ISO/IEC 19987 (EPCIS) event concepts.

harmonizedEventType.description: Simplified high-level status for UI and aggregation

definitionType.description: Semantic category: MILESTONE=key progression; INFO=informational; EXCEPTION=incident/error

codifiedMeaning.description: Reference to external standard for machine interoperability

code.description: Code value from the scheme (e.g. PEPPOL numeric '21', '18')
